title: Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor
text:
Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖 | Teamtailor

May 28, 2026

# Your career site is now agent-ready 🤖

We've upgraded every Teamtailor career site to work seamlessly with AI agents like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Comet, so candidates can find your jobs wherever they search.

Suzan Dil

More and more candidates are letting AI agents do the searching for them. They ask "find me a marketing job in London" and want their agent to come back with real opportunities. To show up in those answers, your career site needs to speak the agents' language. We've got you covered 🚀

Every Teamtailor career site now supports the latest open standards for the agentic web, including llms.txt, AI-friendly robots.txt rules, sitemaps, link headers, markdown content negotiation, and content signals. You don't need to do anything to enable this.

This means AI agents can discover your open roles, read your content and guide candidates straight to your application form, with no extra setup from you. It's live on all career sites today.

We hope you and your future candidates will like this.

❤️ / The Product Team

Check out some more articles that may be of interest!

### Build custom Analytics reports using AI ✨

### Teamtailor Co-pilot can now edit text your way ✨

### Latest integrations: Powering up your recruitment workflow (Dec 2025 – Mar 2026)

- May 25, 2026Just describe the chart you want, and Co-pilot generates it for you.
- Apr 14, 2026Teamtailor's Co-pilot helps you refine text directly in the Job Editor. Apply quick editing actions, or use custom prompts to tailor your job ads.
- Apr 9, 2026We are thrilled to announce new and powerful integrations that have gone live from December to March!

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

title: How Pemo scaled fintech hiring in MENA | Teamtailor
text:
How Pemo scaled fintech hiring in MENA | Teamtailor

Apr 7, 2026

# How Pemo scaled fintech hiring in MENA

Louise Cross

UK Marketing at Teamtailor

The fintech world moves fast. Pemo, a B2B corporate finance platform serving the MENA region, knew they had to match that pace when it came to hiring. But speed alone wasn't enough. They needed to build something sustainable: a hiring function that could scale without sacrificing candidate experience or quality of hire.

Before adopting Teamtailor, Pemo was managing recruitment the way many growing companies do: shared spreadsheets, scattered email threads, and candidate information spread across multiple platforms. There was no centralized system, no pipeline visibility, and no real employer brand to speak of. It worked well at first and as the company expanded across the UAE and opened their Cairo office, new opportunities for improvement and growth began to emerge.

The real challenge wasn't just volume. It was the unique complexity of fintech hiring in the MENA region: competing for a relatively small pool of talent with both technical depth and regional market knowledge, navigating cross-cultural hiring across multiple countries and the trust-based screening required in financial services. High-quality candidates in this space don't stay on the market long, and they're evaluating employers just as rigorously as employers evaluate them.

That's when Pemo decided to invest in a proper foundation for their recruitment process.

People & Talent Lead @ Pemo

## Meet Dina Ismail

Dina owns People & Talent Management at Pemo, driving the hiring strategy across regions and acting as a People Business Partner to support teams. This includes leading end-to-end recruitment, partnering with leaders on workforce planning and hiring decisions, managing people and talent partners, and supporting employee relations and capability building. She focuses on attracting high-quality talent and creating experiences that enable people t

title: How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor
text:
How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor

Feb 26, 2026

# How Knauf Transformed its Global Recruitment for 43,000 Employees

Bridging tradition and technology: The Global Recruitment team is bringing Knauf’s 90-year history into the digital age

Discover how James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at Knauf, steered a two-year digital transformation to unify recruitment for 43,500 employees, ultimately driving a 50% increase in applicant volume while bridging the gap between a 90-year legacy and modern talent acquisition.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

Knauf is a global leader in the building materials industry - a 90-year-old, family-owned powerhouse. But as their factories became "smarter" and their sales processes went digital, their recruitment process faced a challenge: it was stuck in a decentralized, manual past.

We spoke with James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at the Knauf Group People Team, about how he navigated this complex transformation. His goal? To move from a fragmented "black box" of local processes to a unified, "best-in-class" global engine.

## Why Change was needed

Question: How would you describe Knauf’s recruitment philosophy? In an industry as established as yours, how do you balance "tradition" with the need for modern talent acquisition?

James Forster: "Our recruitment philosophy centres on two pillars: we deliver a best-in-class candidate experience—clear, timely communication; transparency, fair, inclusive evaluation; and respectful closure for every applicant. We also equip our people with a robust, data-enabled hiring system that empowers both candidates and colleagues to identify, assess, and secure best-in-class talent, consistently and at scale. Historically one of the last to embrace digitalisation, our sector is now moving quickly. We seek people who are technologically fluent but also thrive within a family-owned, values-led environment. Our process should mirror the organisation we are b

title: BambooHR Careers | Come grow with us
text:
BambooHR Careers | Come grow with us

# Welcome to BambooHR Careers

We make game-changing HR software that sets people free to do great work! If you're passionate about doing meaningful work with friendly, talented people, check out the career opportunities at BambooHR, and apply to join us.

View Open Positions

Style

BG bottom cap 5, gray gradient

## What sets BambooHR apart?

## Our mission

Our mission is to set people free to do great work, and that includes everybody—ourselves, our teams, and our customers!

## Our vision

Our vision is to become the #1 HR platform for businesses of all sizes around the world. We get there by building an awesome product, always having our customers’ backs, and delivering exceptional HR experiences—in our product and beyond.

## Our values

Our values inform everything we do at BambooHR—they set the standard for how we communicate and act. We’re proud of how our values guide the way we do business and interact with our customers and each other every day.

Learn More

## Our history

Founded in 2008, BambooHR started with the goal of building a great place to work and creating innovative HR tools to help every business do the same. We’ve grown a lot since then, but these founding principles still drive us forward.

## Living our unique values

### Grow from Good to Great

From the very beginning, BambooHR has been determined to create a better business and product, in a better way. We believe in intentional and exceptional growth—for ourselves, our product, and our company—and we’re never satisfied with the status quo.

### Enjoy Quality of Life

We care about doing quality work and showing up for our team and customers, and we make time for our families, friends, and communities. Home life, work life—it’s all life! And we strive to live it well.

### Make It Count

We believe making our time here count is how we grow from good to great and enjoy a high quality of life. Hard work and sustained focus got us here, and it’s the

title: "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor
text:
"Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor

Jan 30, 2026

# "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment

Nadezda Muttonen, Regita Kumel, and Triin Kimer, People & Culture Team, ESTO

Discover how Regita Kumel and the ESTO team are proving that lightning-fast recruitment can still feel incredibly personal, creating a 21-day hiring journey where every candidate - hired or not - walks away feeling like a winner.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

In the high-stakes world of FinTech, the Baltic company ESTO stands out - not just for its record-breaking revenue growth, but for its approach to the people behind the numbers. Headquartered in Tallinn, ESTO has grown into a 100-person powerhouse by connecting 6,000+ merchants with innovative consumer finance solutions. But as any fast-growth company knows, scaling the business requires scaling the team and culture.

We sat down with Regita Kumel, Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, to discuss how they moved away from modules that didn't keep up with the companies fast growth, to embrace a recruitment process that is as intuitive and data-driven as the financial products they build.

Talent & Employer Branding Manager, ESTO

## Meet Regita Kumel

Regita is the Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, bringing a wealth of experience from both HR agencies and in-house roles at high-growth companies. Specializing in the Fintech, e-commerce, and service sectors, she focuses on bridging the gap between strategic recruitment and authentic employer branding.

### The Need for a Centralized Hub

Teamtailor: Before Teamtailor, what were the "growing pains" in your recruitment process?

Regita: We were using a basic recruitment module, but it lacked the centralization we needed. Managers couldn’t independently track their own processes, and we didn’t have a way to build a long-term talent pool. We needed a platform that was flexible and intuitive - s

title: DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent US job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by more than 1600 companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.com to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.com, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the US – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 45 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 1600 companies fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.com Support article: Read more about this package

## DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent US job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by more than 1600 companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.com to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.com, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the US – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 45 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 1600 companies fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.com Support article: Read more about this package
